pi_items.source: Task setup script (setup_task.sh) explicitly creates and uses this repository name via Artifactory REST API, and export_result.sh verifies its deletion.
Task description instructs creating this repository, and export_result.sh checks for its existence.
Environment setup script (setup_artifactory.sh) downloads this exact artifact from Maven Central, setup_task.sh uploads it to this path, and export_result.sh verifies its presence in the new repo.
Found in task_utils.sh and setup_artifactory.sh as the default ADMIN_USER used for API requests.
Found in task_utils.sh and setup_artifactory.sh as the default ADMIN_PASS used for API requests.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires migrating a real artifact (Apache Commons Lang 3.14.0, size ~658KB, downloaded from Maven Central) from an existing local repository 'legacy-dev-local' to a newly created local repository 'module-core-local', followed by deleting the old repository. Artifactory is accessed using the default admin credentials 'admin' and 'password'.
